matrix_targets.description: The reproduced prompt must be a constitutional protocol prompt, not a validator scoring prompt.
At least two datacenter GPU classes must produce matching parsed output and matching full-vocabulary fixed-point roots.
The successful receipts must come from distinct provider run IDs, with redaction-safe cleanup proof.
The verifier must recompute stored vector file hashes and the full-vocabulary root locally.
Same-class different-host coverage is tracked separately. It is not claimed unless two distinct hosts for the same hardware class are present.

classification_scale.green: The target is directly proven by the current report set.
classification_scale.yellow: The target is not contradicted but is only partially covered or not yet sampled.
classification_scale.red: The target diverged or failed closed.
